member-basic.name: Basic Member Info
member-basic.description: Minimal member information for quick surveys
member-basic.sql: SELECT record_number, first_name, last_name, email FROM members WHERE record_number = :recordNumber LIMIT 1

member-detailed.name: Detailed Member Profile
member-detailed.description: Complete member information including address and membership details
member-detailed.sql: SELECT record_number, first_name, last_name, email, phone, organization, department, membership_level, membership_status, join_date, renewal_date, address_line1, city, state, postal_code, country FROM members WHERE record_number = :recordNumber AND membership_status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

member-premium.name: Premium Members with Benefits
member-premium.description: Premium and VIP members with their benefits
member-premium.sql: SELECT m.record_number, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.membership_level, m.join_date, LISTAGG(b.benefit_name, ', ') as benefits FROM members m LEFT JOIN member_benefits b ON m.record_number = b.record_number WHERE m.record_number = :recordNumber AND m.membership_level IN ('Premium', 'VIP') AND m.membership_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY m.record_number, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.membership_level, m.join_date LIMIT 1

employee.name: Employee Information
employee.sql: SELECT employee_id as record_number, first_name, last_name, email, department, job_title, manager_name, hire_date, employment_status FROM employees WHERE employee_id = :employeeId AND employment_status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

customer-orders.name: Customer with Order History
customer-orders.sql: SELECT c.customer_id as record_number, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, c.customer_since, COUNT(o.order_id) as total_orders, COALESCE(SUM(o.order_total), 0) as lifetime_value, MAX(o.order_date) as last_order_date FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.customer_id = :customerId GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, c.customer_since LIMIT 1

member-by-email.name: Member Lookup by Email
member-by-email.description: Find member using email address instead of record number
member-by-email.sql: SELECT record_number, first_name, last_name, email, membership_level, membership_status FROM members WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(:email) AND membership_status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
